name: MOJ‑TM‑HAA‑13 - RDS Audit Logging Parameter Modification
description: MON-4697 Modification of RDS audit or logging parameters indicating potential tampering with database auditing controls
alert_name: MOJ‑TM‑HAA‑13 - RDS Audit Logging Parameter Modification
alert_description: RDS audit or logging configuration change detected. Review parameters and confirm whether auditing remains enabled.
investigation_query_link:
dataset = amazon_aws_raw
| filter eventID = "{{event_ids}}"
| sort desc _time
